title: Velvety Greek Toor Dal Stir-Fry
description: A herbal and velvety Greek-inspired dish featuring toor dal alongside pickles for a hangover-cure in a kosher-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: Pickled Vegetables
ingredients.notes: use any variety but preferably spicy to aid hangover cure

instructions: Rinse and soak toor dal in water for at least 30 minutes.
Heat oil in a pan over medium heat, add turmeric powder and green chilies if using.
Add soaked toor dal, sauté for about 2-3 minutes until the dal is slightly golden.
Stir in pickled vegetables and cook for another minute.
Pour in water, enough to cover the dal, bring to a boil then reduce heat to simmer.
Simmer until dal becomes soft and creamy (approximately 15-20 minutes).
Remove from heat, stir in fresh cilantro leaves just before serving.
